case_title: DISCOVER BANK VS. RHODORA C MANUEL et al

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Aug-01-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is Granted. No opposition filed. The court notes that opposing party's counsel's motion to withdraw was denied on 7/13/12 for failure to provide courtesy copies or appear at the hearing. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order pursuant to CCP 437 C(g) Judge: Curtis Karnow, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976 =(302/CK)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jul-13-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court ruled as follows:
THE BERG LAW GROUP'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT RHODORA MANUEL is denied because of no appearance at the hearing and and the moving party's failure to provide courtesy copies as required by Local Rule 2.6 B. Judge: Harold Kahn; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =(302/HEK)
